item.title: Tator vs. The Dozer
item.description: It’s tow truck versus dozer in a battle of strength. Who wins when heavy machinery goes head‑to‑head?

item.title: Ram’s river mishap calls for a muddy rescue
item.description: A truck ends up stuck near a riverbank, leading to a muddy and complex recovery operation. How do crews handle slippery, waterlogged terrain?

media:content.media:title: Ram’s river mishap calls for a muddy rescue
media:content.media:description: A truck ends up stuck near a riverbank, leading to a muddy and complex recovery operation. How do crews handle slippery, waterlogged terrain?

item.title: 220,000 LBS Stuck
item.description: A demanding recovery job puts skill, equipment, and planning to the test. What makes heavy recoveries so complex?

item.title: Loaded tanker stuck off the road
item.description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

media:content.media:description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

item.title: Broken Trailer Recovery
item.description: A broken trailer needs careful handling to get back under control. What’s the most challenging trailer recovery you’ve seen?
